title: argyranthemum adauctum subsp. palmensis
intro: Argyranthemum adauctum subsp. palmensis, also known as the Canary Island Daisy, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Argyranthemum adauctum subsp. palmensis include reducing inflammation, treating skin conditions such as acne and eczema, and even helping to lower blood pressure. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
